content: FastAPI SSE streaming: use StreamingResponse with media_type='text/event-stream' or sse-starlette EventSourceResponse. Async generator yields ServerSentEvent objects. SSE is unidirectional (server to client), handles auto-reconnect, supports event IDs. For AI agent streaming, wrap Anthropic streaming call in async generator that yields token chunks. Client uses EventSource API or fetch with ReadableStream. WebSockets add bidirectional complexity not needed for chat responses. Prefer SSE for agent response streaming.
